title: Winnipeg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Winnipeg with a Z-Score of -4.31. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Winnipeg are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high number of heating degree days (HDD), with a value of 16.1 GG, while cooling degree days (CDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 47%, and the wind speed is approximately 16.8 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this extreme weather event.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to extreme cold
